title: Europe seeks to turn talent and AI into a competitive advantage over US and China
description: Europe faces a decisive moment for its technological competitiveness: boosting artificial intelligence, developing hybrid talent and improving funding will be key to competing with the US and China.

title: Project Sunrise: Jeff Bezos's Blue Origin to build 51,000-satellite constellation
description: The system is intended to meet the rapidly growing global demand for artificial intelligence (AI) and cloud computing.
content:
Blue Origin, the space company founded by Jeff Bezos, has unveiled plans to build a massive satellite constellation aimed at taking data centres into orbit, marking a significant expansion of its ambitions beyond launch services.

title: Nvidia’s $20 billion Groq deal queried by Warren, Blumenthal
description: Nvidia Corp.’s $20 billion licensing deal with artificial intelligence startup Groq is being probed by a pair of Democratic senators over whether it violates antitrust laws by improperly avoiding a merger review and illegally consolidating its power in the market for AI computing.

title: Amazon working on new smartphone years after Fire Phone flop: Report
description: Amazon is planning a comeback in the smartphone market. The company is reportedly developing a new AI-driven mobile hub. This device aims to integrate with Alexa and enhance Amazon services. It could offer a conventional smartphone or a simpler 'dumbphone'. This move signals Amazon's increased focus on artificial intelligence in consumer devices.

title: Infosys Launches AI-Powered Race Centre with Formula E to Transform Fan Experience
description: Infosys has launched an AI-driven race centre in partnership with Formula E, featuring live commentary, interactive games, and data integration capabilities. The platform represents a significant advancement in sports technology, leveraging artificial intelligence to enhance fan engagement and create immersive motorsport experiences. This collaboration demonstrates Infosys's continued commitment to innovation in sports entertainment technology.

title: Palantir CTO says artificial intelligence is key to reshoring American manufacturing
description: Contrary to the narrative that AI is going to destroy all our jobs, Palantir chief technology officer Shyam Sankar believes AI is already bringing production and jobs back to the US.
content:
Could artificial intelligence be the key to reshoring American manufacturing?

title: Artificial Intelligence: Revolutionizing Every Aspect of Life - Patiala House Court Grants Anticipatory Bail to AI Summit Protest Key Figure
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly redefining the way we live, work, and interact. No longer confined to the realm of science fiction, AI is now a driving force behind innovations across all sectors— from healthcare and finance to entertainment and manufacturing. Its impact is far-reaching, transforming industries, reshaping economies, and influencing the way we navigate daily life.
